3145960.name: Starship Architect
3145960.description:
Starship Architect is a high-octane roguelike where every decision counts. Battle relentless enemies, choose from a dynamic arsenal of weapons and upgrades, and strategically assemble your ship. Unlock powerful new parts after each run and craft the perfect starship.

Battle Relentless Enemies

Face waves of relentless foes that will test your reflexes and strategy at every turn. Each encounter pushes you to adapt, with enemies growing stronger and more cunning as you progress. Only the most skilled pilots will survive the onslaught and emerge victorious.

Unlock More Powerful Parts

The more you play, the more powerful parts you unlock, allowing you to build even more formidable starships. Experiment with new combinations, refine your strategies, and push the boundaries of what's possible as you discover the most potent setups in the game. Every run brings you closer to conquering the cosmos.

Choose from an Arsenal of Weapons & Upgrades

Equip your starship with a diverse selection of weapons, modifiers, and defensive parts that can dramatically alter your playstyle. Whether you prefer heavy firepower, rapid maneuvers, or intricate defensive setups, every run offers a fresh set of choices to keep your gameplay exciting and unpredictable.

Strategically Assemble your Starship

In Starship Architect, the way you arrange your ship's components is just as important as the parts themselves. Every modifier interacts with the parts around it, creating powerful synergies or devastating weaknesses. Master the art of placement to craft a ship that can withstand anything the galaxy throws at you.
